purpose: Exact official-source targets for bounded, deterministic ingestion. Target verification is not equivalent to field-level content verification.

ca_official_source_pack_v2.jsonl.description: Core official program, form, rights, appeals, and transition targets.

ca_directory_targets_v1.jsonl.description: Exact local and statewide directory targets, including 58 counties and 21 Regional Centers.

publication_rule: No record or field is publication-ready until fetched evidence is parsed, cited at field level, validated, and accepted by the completeness gate.
